result.stdout:
AzDevBridge Commands:

-u|--update Update work items and pullrequests

-gn|--get-notifications Get notifications

-lw|--list-workitems List workitems

-lp|--list-pullrequest List pullrequests

-w|--workitem <Workitem Id> Get workitem detail
	<Workitem Id>  Workitem Id

-p|--pullrequest <Pullrequest Id> Get pullrequest detail
	<Pullrequest Id>  Pullrequest Id

--set-config <Set configuration> configuration json
	<Set configuration>  Set configuration

--get-config Get full configuration

--set-key|--set-token <AzureDevOps token> Set AzureDevOps token
	<AzureDevOps token>  AzureDevOps token

--set-url <AzureDevOps url> Set AzureDevOps Url
	<AzureDevOps url>  AzureDevOps url

--get-url Get AzureDevOps Url

--set-query <AzureDevOps custom query for work items> Set AzureDevOps custom query for work items
	<AzureDevOps custom query for work items>  AzureDevOps custom query for work items

--get-query Get AzureDevOps custom query for work items

--set-notify <Notyfy 0 = false, 1 = true> Set Notify
	<Notyfy 0 = false, 1 = true>  Notyfy 0 = false, 1 = true

--get-notify Get Notify

--set-notes <Notyfy 0 = false, 1 = true> Set Notes Field
	<Notyfy 0 = false, 1 = true>  Notyfy 0 = false, 1 = true

--get-notes Get Notes Field

--set-criteria <Notyfy 0 = false, 1 = true> Set Acceptance Criterias Field
	<Notyfy 0 = false, 1 = true>  Notyfy 0 = false, 1 = true

--get-criteria Get Acceptance Criterias Field

--set-update <Last Update Time yyyy-MM-dd> Set Last Update
	<Last Update Time yyyy-MM-dd>  Last Update Time yyyy-MM-dd

--get-update Get Last Update

--clear-data Clear data

-h|--help Show help

-v|--version show version
